subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles, and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask assigned to mid tier because multi-party contracts require coordinated extraction of related fields across multiple party entities with potential address format variations and role classification. A small tier agent may miss subtle role distinctions or address components. One subtask is sufficient—all party information can be extracted in a single unified pass with a schema that captures arrays of party objects, each containing name, role, and address fields."
